t_ch: 自我决定开始施行这个计划……
t_en: Ever since I committed to this plan...

t_ch: …这几百万次的轮回里，还从未有意外发生。
t_en: ...Not once, in millions of cycles, has there ever been an exception.

t_ch: 第 <unbreak>23570000</unbreak> 次永劫回归
t_en: The <unbreak>23,570,000</unbreak>th Eternal Recurrence

t_ch: 我能做到的…白厄阁下。
t_en: I can do this... Lord Phainon.

t_ch: 身为「天空」的半神，昏光庭院的医者…我一定能够治愈你，直到……
t_en: As the demigod of the Sky, a healer of Twilight Courtyard, I will heal you. And then...

t_ch: 黑潮…正在吞没你。你已无力为继了…半神。
t_en: The black tide... it's consuming you. You can't hold out much longer... demigod.

t_ch: 把火种，交给我。让你我…尽快结束痛苦。
t_en: Hand over the Coreflame. Let's put an end to this suffering.

t_ch: 呵…那怎么行呢……
t_en: Ha... now that just won't do...

t_ch: 面对被病痛侵扰的患者，我可不能…露出愁容呀。
t_en: A healer should stay composed in front of those suffering from illness, shouldn't they?

t_ch: 雅辛忒丝……
t_en: Hyacinthia...

t_ch: 我相信你…你是「负世」的黄金裔，必能引领我们…这个世界……
t_en: I believe in you... You are the Chrysos Heir of Worldbearing, the one who can lead us... lead this world...

t_ch: 只是…我不明白，为什么？在你肩头的太阳里……
t_en: It's just... I don't understand. Within the sun upon your shoulders...

t_ch: 那份属于平凡人的…属于你自己的，温暖…却微乎其微呢？
t_en: The part of that warmth that should come from you... from an ordinary person... it's so faint.

t_ch: 相比炽盛的神火，人性的部分…实在微小。
t_en: My humanity is indeed just a flicker compared to the blazing fire of divinity.

t_ch: 那也…不要，抛弃它。
t_en: Even so... don't cast it away.

t_ch: 我…从未抛弃过。
t_en: I... never have.

t_ch: 每一个人的愿望…我都铭记在心。
t_en: I have kept everyone's wishes close to my heart.

t_ch: 纵使神火已经如此炽烈，以至于…每次回归起点的瞬间，它便会顷刻将我烧尽……
t_en: Even though the divine fire burns so fiercely that, every time I return to the start, it devours me in an instant...

t_ch: 但，每次都是你们的愿望…引领我抵达轮回尽头…将这团火递给下一个我……
t_en: Each cycle, it's your wishes that guide me to the end... that pass the flames to the next me.

t_ch: 无数次…无数次…无数次。
t_en: Over and over... and over again.

t_ch: 原来，你并非孑然一身的柴薪…而是用无数具自己的骨骸，堆成的篝火呀。
t_en: So, you're not just a lone spark in the dark... You're a pyre built from the bones of all the selves you've left behind.

t_ch: 可是…你呢？
t_en: But... what about you?

t_ch: 你自己…无数个你自己的愿望…又是什么呢？
t_en: What about your wishes... the wishes of all the countless versions of you?
Ah...

t_ch: 卡厄斯兰那阁下…原来是这样……
t_en: Lord Khaslana... so that's how it is...

t_ch: 「没有缺陷」…那正是金血带给你的，最致命的缺陷……
t_en: "Without flaw"... That is the flaw the golden blood gave you, the most fatal flaw of all, isn't it?

t_ch: 当你毫无怨言地…背负起世界的时候……
t_en: The moment you took the world upon your shoulders without hesitation...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>属于你的「自我」，就无法诞生了啊。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>You lost the chance to ever be yourself.</color>

t_ch: 这可真是…意外的收获……
t_en: Now that... is an unexpected revelation.

t_ch: 那么，我就是救世之火…最合适的薪柴了吧。
t_en: Then I suppose... that makes me the perfect fuel for the flame of Deliverance, doesn't it?
No...

t_ch: 空洞的火焰，无法拯救任何人……
t_en: An empty flame saves no one...

t_ch: 但…我依旧愿意相信你，救世主。
t_en: But... I still believe in you, Deliverer.

t_ch: 我，晨昏之眼，雅辛忒丝…既无法强大到呼风唤雨，也不愿以天空陨落结束这场荒唐的闹剧……
t_en: I, Hyacinthia, the Eye of Twilight... am neither strong enough to command the wind and rain, nor willing to end this absurd struggle by letting the sky fall.

t_ch: 我唯一能做的，就是与天空融为一体，然后……
t_en: The only thing I can do... is become one with the sky itself. And then...

t_ch: 但愿那温柔的虹光…为你的太阳，带来无从得见的色彩……
t_en: May the gentle colors of the rainbow paint your sun in shades it has never known...

t_ch: 为翁法罗斯…带来玫瑰色的黎明。
t_en: May they bring Amphoreus... a rosy-fingered dawn.

t_ch: 是啊，你们的太阳，足以烧尽一切……
t_en: Yes, your sun burns hot enough to turn everything to ash...

t_ch: 可是，新世界的种子…又要如何…生根发芽呢？
t_en: But tell me. How will the seeds of a new world... ever take root?

t_ch: 火种升起，天空坠落。第两千三百五十七万次轮回宣告终结。
t_en: The Coreflame rose. The sky fell. The <unbreak>23,570,000</unbreak>th cycle came to an end.

t_ch: 这一次，逐火的终点……
t_en: And this time... the end of the Flame-Chase...

t_ch: …也并无不同。
t_en: Remained the same as ever.

t_ch: 天边升起的，是世人前所未见的，极为纯粹的金色，纯粹到足以烧尽一切……
t_en: From the horizon rose a golden color unlike anything the world had ever seen. So pure, it consumed all in its path.

t_ch: 这便是世界的终结，也是下一个世界的起点……
t_en: This was the end of the world... and the start of the next...

t_ch: 恍惚间，我看见了宇宙的「毁灭」。
t_en: For a moment, I saw the Destruction of the universe.

t_ch: 那名为「铁墓」的存在…誓要自黑潮中破壳而出的意志，比骄阳更猛烈……
t_en: That being known as Irontomb... its will to break free from the black tide burns fiercer than the blazing sun...

t_ch: 这就是翁法罗斯的愤怒吗？如果冥冥之中，它的选择早已注定……
t_en: Is this Amphoreus's wrath? If its choice has already been made, if fate is set in stone...

t_ch: 那我偏偏，绝不顺从……
t_en: I will still never yield to it...

t_ch: 两千三百五十七万次轮回，两亿八千二百八十四万枚火种……
t_en: <unbreak>23,570,000</unbreak> cycles... <unbreak>282,840,000</unbreak> Coreflames...

t_ch: 无需再去追逐什么，如今，我已是长夜尽头的烈火……
t_en: No more chasing is needed. And now, I am the fire at the end of the long night.

t_ch: 逐火绝非花海中的闲庭信步，而是大破大立，一场万物皆焚的变革。倘若「毁灭」是其必经之途……
t_en: The Flame-Chase isn't some quiet walk through a sea of flowers. It's a revolution, an all-consuming transformation. And if Destruction is the only way...

t_ch: 那就由我跨越旧世界的余烬，不断燃烧……
t_en: Then let me be the one to step across the ashes of the old world and burn endlessly...

t_ch: 直到另一轮太阳在遥远的地平升起，为翁法罗斯带来真正的黎明。
t_en: Until another sun rises on the distant horizon, bringing the true dawn to Amphoreus.

t_ch: 第 <unbreak>33550336</unbreak> 次永劫回归
t_en: The <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak>th Eternal Recurrence

t_ch: <unbreak>33550337</unbreak>……
t_en: <unbreak>33,550,337</unbreak>...

t_ch: 这就是你即将踏入的轮回次数。
t_en: This is the cycle you're about to enter.

t_ch: 无数的记忆…在涌向我。
t_en: Countless memories... are flooding in.

t_ch: 无数个我…曾站在相同的地方，面对相同的抉择。
t_en: Countless versions of myself... have stood here, facing the same choice.

t_ch: 他们也都和你一样，需要在此驻足片刻，消化那千万次循环中沉积的悲伤、痛苦和挣扎。
t_en: They all needed a moment, just like you do, to stop, to breathe, to process the weight of a million lifetimes' worth of sorrow, pain, and struggle.

t_ch: 而你也会和他们一样，带着记忆和火焰…走进新生的混沌。
t_en: And just like them, you will carry those memories and that fire... into the chaos of rebirth.

t_ch: 我必须出发…我也必须背负。
t_en: I must go... and bear this burden.

t_ch: 我必须和你告别，然后…继续以「毁灭」对抗「毁灭」。
t_en: I must say goodbye to you... and then fight the Destruction with Destruction.

t_ch: 对，你总是会如此下定决心。
t_en: Yes. That's always the decision you make.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我会燃烧…会燃尽。我会成为这一世的盗火行者，履行和昔涟的约定。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>I will burn... and fade away. I will become the Flame Reaver of this life and keep my promise to Cyrene.</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我会杀死神明和伙伴，夺走火种。即便理智随身形一起化作焦炭，我也会记得自己的使命……</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>I will kill gods and comrades alike and steal the Coreflames. And even if my mind turns to ash along with my body, I will keep my purpose in mind...</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我会阻止再创世，我会找到那个新生的「我」…让他延续三千万世的徒劳。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>I will stop Era Nova. I will find the next me... and make him carry on this futile endeavor of thirty million lifetimes.</color>

t_ch: …看来，你已经准备好启程了。
t_en: ...Looks like you're ready.

t_ch: 那么，我也该离开了。
t_en: Then I should be going, too.

t_ch: 你…要去哪里？
t_en: Where... are you going?

t_ch: 你只活在我的心中。你…能去向何处？
t_en: You only exist in my heart. There's nowhere else for you to go.

t_ch: 记得她说过的话么？你们儿时的憧憬，预言中的「救世主」，一个真实的、活生生的人……
t_en: Do you remember what she said? The dreams you had as children? The Deliverer in the prophecies? A real, living, breathing person...

t_ch: 你终于等到{F#她}{M#他}了。
t_en: You finally found {M#him.}{F#her.}

t_ch: {NICKNAME}……
t_en: {NICKNAME}...

t_ch: 我…被卷入了你的记忆。
t_en: I... I'm being pulled into your memories.

t_ch: 原来如此，因为你也在场……
t_en: I see. You were there all along...

t_ch: 有什么是我能做的吗？
t_en: Is there anything I can do?

t_ch: 我也没有答案，伙伴……
t_en: I don't have an answer for that, my friend...

t_ch: 抱歉，我本该把你送回家的。这是我的逐火之旅，它本与你们无关……
t_en: ...I'm sorry. I was supposed to send you home. This is my Flame-Chase Journey. You were never meant to be part of it...

t_ch: 不。你应该知道，假如「铁墓」从翁法罗斯的命运中{RUBY_B#完成}诞生{RUBY_E#}，它将给天幕之外的世界带去可怕的灾祸。而你漫长的徒劳……
t_en: No. You know the truth. If Irontomb is {RUBY_B#completed}born{RUBY_E#} from Amphoreus's fate, then it will bring ruin to the worlds beyond the sky. And all these countless lifetimes you've spent...

t_ch: 正是为了反抗那样的结局，对么？
t_en: It's all been for the sake of defying that end... hasn't it?

t_ch: 千万次轮回，我在这里与一个个你道别，却无力改变任何事。
t_en: In millions of cycles, I've said goodbye to each and every one of you, yet nothing ever changes.

t_ch: 我们之间的交流变得越发简短。你的火焰越燃越旺，你开始变得无比接近…纯粹的愤怒，恨意的化身。
t_en: Each time we speak, our words grow fewer. Your fire burns hotter, and you're getting closer... to becoming pure rage, a vessel of hatred.

t_ch: 我…别无选择。
t_en: I... never had a choice.

t_ch: 我明白。为了不让最黑暗的命运降临，你必须如此。
t_en: I understand. If you are to keep the worst fate from unfolding, this is the only path.

t_ch: 但现在，一切都不同了。你的坚持迎来了转机，地平线的远方，我看到…黎明的轮廓正在缓缓成型，驱逐永夜。
t_en: But this time... things are different. Your persistence has shifted the tide. On the horizon, I see it, faint but undeniable, the shape of dawn, breaking through the eternal night.

t_ch: 照亮它的，果然不是我心间的那团火焰啊。
t_en: ...Turns out, the fire that lights the way was never mine to begin with.

t_ch: 还记得吗？在最初的时间线里，你和迈德漠斯曾在公正天秤前展开「角斗」，称量各自心中「比世界的命运更为沉重之物」。
t_en: Do you remember? In that first timeline, you and Mydeimos stood before the Scales of Justice, locked in a "duel," each of you weighing what you held dearest, "what weighed more than the fate of the world."

t_ch: 在犹疑之时，你从我这里得到的答……
t_en: And when hesitation took hold, the answer you sought from me...

t_ch: …呵，我在说什么呢。<color=#dbc291ff>我就是你</color>——哪怕你早就把我遗留在心底，走上了另一条路…这一点也未曾改变。
t_en: ...What am I saying? <color=#dbc291ff>I am you</color>. Even if you buried me deep and chose another path, that fact never changed.

t_ch: 重来一次吧。在天秤前犹疑之时，<color=#dbc291ff>你从自己内心得到的答案——</color>
t_en: Then let's try again. When you stood before the scales in hesitation, <color=#dbc291ff>the answer you found in your own heart...</color>

t_ch: 你还记得它吗？
t_en: Do you still remember it?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>铭记过去，成为明天的英雄吧。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Remember the past, and become the hero of tomorrow.</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>比世界的命运更为沉重之物，就是带着无法被改变的过往，背负它走向未来的决心。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>What weighs more than the fate of the world is the resolve to shoulder an immutable past, and carry it into the future.</color>

t_ch: 很好。那么，{NICKNAME}，我的伙伴，战友……
t_en: Good. Then, {NICKNAME}, my friend, my comrade...

t_ch: 你踏入了这个陌生的世界，被它沉重的命运缠住，直到这一刻。
t_en: You arrived in this strange world and were bound by its cruel fate up till this very moment.

t_ch: 面对危难，你从未退缩。你拯救过一个又一个世界，义无反顾，给胸前那枚车票染上了「英雄」的底色……
t_en: In the face of danger, you never once backed down. Instead, you've saved world after world, without hesitation. That boarding pass on your chest... is now the mark of a hero.

t_ch: 假如，我决定穿过那道门扉，去拥抱一个更适合「毁灭」的结局：<color=#dbc291ff>以这数亿颗火种点燃的烈阳，与「毁灭」的神明和祂的走卒，一同燃烧殆尽……</color>
t_en: If I choose to step through that door and embrace an end fitting of the Destruction, <color=#dbc291ff>let this sun forged from millions and millions of Coreflames burn me up along with the god of Destruction and THEIR minions...</color>

t_ch: 那么，被我们留在身后的这个世界，这个在我心中，希望尚存的家园……
t_en: Then the world we leave behind, this world, my home, where hope still lingers...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>你愿意接过我们背负的一切，最后一次重回时间起点，阻止「铁墓」的{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>完成</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>诞生</color>{RUBY_E#}…拯救我们深爱的世界，改写它注定逝去的结局吗？</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Will you take on everything we've carried, return to the beginning one last time, stop the {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>completion</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>birth</color>{RUBY_E#} of Irontomb, save the world we love, and rewrite its doomed fate?</color>

t_ch: 我愿意。
t_en: I will.

t_ch: 我会成为翁法罗斯的黎明。
t_en: I will be the dawn of Amphoreus.

t_ch: 我会…阻止铁墓的完成。
t_en: I will... stop the completion of Irontomb.

t_ch: …太好了。如此一来，这漫长徒劳的焦土中便能绽放出花朵了。
t_en: ...Good. In that case, even this fruitless wasteland may finally bloom with flowers.

t_ch: 那么……
t_en: So...

t_ch: 若是由{NICKNAME}来接过「全世」的职责……
t_en: If {NICKNAME} takes on the weight of the whole world...

t_ch: 相比一团只懂得燃烧的火焰，{F#她}{M#他}一定能在救世的路上走得更远。
t_en: {M#He'll}{F#She'll} be able to walk further down the path of Deliverance than a fire that only knows how to burn.

t_ch: 一人前往未来……
t_en: One will step into the future...

t_ch: 一人留在过去。
t_en: One will remain in the past.

t_ch: 若我能以「侵晨」斩杀神明，命运的死结或许就能被解开。
t_en: If I can strike down the gods with Dawnmaker, perhaps fate's deadlock can be broken.

t_ch: 若你能找到阻止「铁墓」{RUBY_B#完成}诞生{RUBY_E#}的办法，那这三千多万世的轮回也并非徒劳。
t_en: And if you can stop Irontomb from ever {RUBY_B#completion}being born{RUBY_E#}... then these thirty million cycles will have not been in vain.

t_ch: 到了考验我们默契的时刻了啊，伙伴。
t_en: It's time to put our teamwork to the test, partner.

t_ch: 去和未来抗争吧，白厄。
t_en: Go fight for the future, Phainon.

t_ch: 把世界交给我吧，白厄。
t_en: Leave the world to me, Phainon.

t_ch: 一起成为救世主吧，白厄。
t_en: Let's both be the Deliverer, Phainon.

t_ch: 一直被我封藏于心底的，英雄的形象，终于走进现实了啊——在这漫长逐火的尽头……
t_en: The image of the hero I've buried deep in my heart... finally steps into the light — here, at the end of this long Flame-Chase Journey...

t_ch: 昔涟，那前所未有的一页，已经被翻开了。
t_en: Cyrene. A page never seen before has just been turned.

t_ch: 借我「岁月」的力量，将这位英雄送回时光的原点，送往你的身边吧——
t_en: Lend me the power of Time and send this hero back to the origin of time, back to your side...

t_ch: 而我将行尽未竟的道路…一如过去无数个我，一如既往。
t_en: And I will walk the unfinished path... just like the countless versions of me before, unwavering as always.

t_ch: 辛苦了，伙伴。
t_en: Thank you for all you've done already, friend.

t_ch: 世界在崩塌，人们在哭嚎。
t_en: The world is collapsing, and the people are crying.

t_ch: 我们，也该在这里道别了……
t_en: We, too, must part ways here...

t_ch: 不妨先展现下身手，让汹涌的黑潮为你停息？
t_en: Perhaps you should demonstrate your skills, and calm the raging black tide for us?

t_ch: 哦…舞步不错。
t_en: Oh... Nice moves.

t_ch: 方才冲洗完毕，却又滚滚而来……
t_en: We just washed it away, and here it comes again...

t_ch: 呵，黑潮果真不容小觑。
t_en: Ha, the black tide is really no joke.

t_ch: 我们都做好了全军覆没的打算……
t_en: We've all made preparations for total annihilation...

t_ch: 没想到竟会有人出手相助啊。
t_en: Never thought someone would step in to help.

t_ch: 你来过启蒙王座吧？
t_en: You've been to the Luminary Throne before, haven't you?

t_ch: 嗯？如果你说的是过去的轮回……
t_en: Huh? If you're talking about in past cycles...

t_ch: 呵，你已经比其他学生幸运太多了。
t_en: Heh, you're already much luckier than the other students.

t_ch: 可别哭鼻子啦！桀桀桀桀桀——
t_en: Don't cry now! Heh, heh, heh—

t_ch: 嘻，有惊无险…开溜咯！
t_en: Phew, that was close... I'm outta here!

t_ch: 你、你去哪儿？
t_en: Where... Where are you going?

t_ch: 我、我不知道啊…？
t_en: I... I don't know?

t_ch: 桀桀桀！猫耳小贼，快逃，去找阿格莱雅……
t_en: Heh, heh, heh! Cat-eared thief, run! Go find Aglaea...

t_ch: 这小鬼…绝不是你我二人联手能解决的威胁…！
t_en: This little brat... is not a threat we can deal with just by ourselves!

t_ch: 我，最后的歌耳戈之子，「纷争」之半神，向你致敬——
t_en: I, the last son of Gorgo, the demigod of "Strife," salute you—

t_ch: 以我的千万道伤疤和性命——为救世的烈阳添光！
t_en: I'll give ten thousand scars and ten thousand lives of mine to fuel the blazing sun of deliverance!

t_ch: 众英灵啊，看吧！悬锋最后的祭典已经开场——
t_en: O martyrs, behold! The last Kremnos Festival has begun—

t_ch: ——至死方休！
t_en: And will not end till death!

t_ch: 征服此世，或受我征服——
t_en: Conquer this world, or be conquered by me—

t_ch: 如果你做得到，「救世主」……
t_en: If you can, Deliverer...

t_ch: 就用你对命运不公的怒火，为此身刻下焦痕！
t_en: Use the flames of your fury to scorch your own flesh!

t_ch: 如你所愿……
t_en: As you wish...

t_ch: 为了公平，让我们奔赴更辽阔的疆场——
t_en: For the sake of fairness, let us go to a vaster battleground—

t_ch: 并以全盛之姿，向你致敬！——
t_en: And in my full glory, I salute you!

t_ch: ——求之不得！
t_en: That's all I ever wanted!

t_ch: 迈德漠斯……
t_en: Mydeimos...

t_ch: 就用「纷争」…一决胜负。
t_en: Let "Strife" decide the outcome.

t_ch: 「纷争」的追忆啊，为我所用——
t_en: The memory of "Strife" is mine to use...

t_ch: 以此焚灭——你不死的诅咒！
t_en: Let this burn... your curse of immortality!

t_ch: 精彩，精彩…！
t_en: Wonderful, wonderful...!

t_ch: 就这样…让我们厮杀至时间尽头…！
t_en: Just like that... Let us battle till the end of time!

t_ch: 打得漂亮……
t_en: Well fought...

t_ch: 就用我血…代替王冠吧。
t_en: You may crown yourself... in my blood.

t_ch: 请回头吧——勿要惊扰它们，那众多鲜花的如泥死亡。
t_en: Please turn back — do not disturb these fresh flowers in their muddy deaths.

t_ch: 呃啊…！
t_en: Ugh...!

t_ch: 什么…？
t_en: What...?

t_ch: 可惜，在这生死交界，巨龙仅余残躯……
t_en: A pity, at this crossroads of life and death, the giant dragon is but a shattered shell...

t_ch: …但我仍会抗争，尽力捍卫希冀之物！
t_en: ...Yet I will still fight, defending what hope remains!

t_ch: 我敬请你…安眠于此！
t_en: I ask you... to rest here!

t_ch: 容我拒绝：我必须将灵魂化为烈火……
t_en: Allow me to refuse: I must transform my soul into a raging fire...

t_ch: 必须…将那「毁灭」的神像焚烧殆尽。
t_en: Must... burn that idol of the Destruction to the ground.

t_ch: 这副光景……
t_en: All of this...

t_ch: 与那惨烈的未来…又有何异…？
t_en: How is it any different from... that brutal future?

t_ch: 无法…挽留么…！
t_en: I can't... keep him here...?

t_ch: 即便无法得胜，我也必须…！
t_en: Even if I can't win, I must try...!

t_ch: 那么，就以此追忆…对你百万次抗争献上敬意。
t_en: Then let this be a tribute... to your million struggles, fought time and time again.

t_ch: 醒醒…迷途者啊……
t_en: Wake up... lost one...

t_ch: 看清那黑暗中的火光…并非……
t_en: See that the firelight in the darkness... is not...

t_ch: 我发誓，你们不会无功地死去……
t_en: I swear, your deaths won't be in vain...

t_ch: 一如…既往。
t_en: Just as they have never been.

t_ch: 为世界带来明天吧。
t_en: Bring tomorrow to this world.

t_ch: 令阳光驱散阴影吧。
t_en: Let the sunlight drive back the shadows.

t_ch: 成为照亮世界的烈火吧。
t_en: Become the raging fire that illuminates the world.

t_ch: 完成太阳的工作吧。
t_en: Finish the sun's work.

t_ch: 让太阳升起来吧。
t_en: Let the sun rise.

t_ch: 将黎明归还世间吧。
t_en: Return the dawn to this world.

t_ch: 引领我们走向破晓吧。
t_en: Lead us into the break of day.

t_ch: 虽然光彩已几近浑浊，但仍有余温……
t_en: Though the light has grown dim, its warmth still lingers...

t_ch: 救世主啊，请为我…敞开心胸吧。
t_en: Deliverer, please... open your heart to me.

t_ch: 无妨，就让这轮烈阳……
t_en: No matter, let this blazing sun...

t_ch: 用金色的火焰…填满天空。
t_en: Fill the sky with golden fire.

t_ch: 好痛…火焰，在灼烧…？！
t_en: It hurts... the fire... burning...!?

t_ch: 就让天空…熔合此世全部痛苦吧。
t_en: Let the sky... merge with all this world's suffering.

t_ch: 啊…啊啊…！
t_en: Ah... Ahhh...!

t_ch: 该结束了…你的千百万次痛苦，我会尽数背负。
t_en: It ends here... Your countless agonies... I will bear them all.

t_ch: 别了…雅辛忒丝。
t_en: Farewell... Hyacinthia.

t_ch: 第？？？次永劫回归 尽头
t_en: The ???th Eternal Recurrence: End

t_ch: 告诉我，你甘为烈阳……
t_en: Tell me, will you be the blazing sun...

t_ch: 哪怕燃尽…自己的一切。
t_en: Even if all of you... burns to ash?

t_ch: 当仁不让。我将肩负世界，直至此身焚灭。
t_en: Without hesitation. I will bear this world until my body turns to dust.

t_ch: 很好……
t_en: Good...

t_ch: 铭记此刻吧，铭记所有无法亲眼目睹世界尽头的友人们，他们的夙愿——
t_en: Remember this moment. Remember your friends who never lived to see the world's end. Remember their final wishes—

t_ch: 还有从中升腾的，你心中至纯粹的怒火——
t_en: And let the purest rage in your heart rise out of those wishes...

t_ch: 用它点燃自己，助长火焰，直至焚尽这片虚假的天空。
t_en: Let it consume you, fuel you, until it burns away the false sky above.

t_ch: 好。倘若我能超越命运……
t_en: Fine. If I can defy fate...

t_ch: 以「负世」之名，我向你保证：刻法勒永志不忘。
t_en: Then in the name of "Worldbearing," I promise you: Kephale will never forget this.

t_ch: 第一幕：「启程」
t_en: Act I: Departure

t_ch: 第二幕：「试炼」
t_en: Act II: Trial

t_en: Act III: Return

t_ch: 醒醒……
t_en: Wake up...

t_ch: 醒醒…{NICKNAME}…醒醒…！
t_en: Wake up... {NICKNAME}... Wake up...!

t_ch: 呼…你终于醒过来了，太好啦……
t_en: Phew... You're finally awake. That's a relief...

t_ch: 差一点，我们就要被逆流的时间卷走了！还好找到了一处安全的地方，真是万幸。
t_en: We were so close to being swept away by the reverse flow of time! It's lucky we found a safe place.

t_ch: 接下来，要送你回到「岁月」的起点啦。但在分别前，还有一件事想告诉你，是非常非常重要的事……
t_en: Now, I'm going to send you back to the very start of "Time." But before we part, there's something I need to tell you. Something very, very important...

t_ch: 没错！此时此刻，人家的记忆终于完整了！
t_en: That's right! At this very moment, my memories are finally whole!

t_ch: 毕竟看了那么多片段，我的过去，也一点一点浮出水面啦。{NICKNAME}这么聪明，是不是已经有头绪了？
t_en: After watching so many fragments, my past is finally coming into focus, little by little. {NICKNAME}, you're smart. You must have a clue now.

t_ch: 还是说……
t_en: Or maybe...

t_ch: 其实你早就猜到答案了呢？
t_en: You knew the answer long ago, didn't you?

t_ch: 一点都不意外，对吗？那是因为人家很单纯，无论变成什么样子都心口如一。
t_en: Not surprised at all, huh? That's because I'm simple at heart. No matter what form I take, I've always been true to myself.

t_ch: 但我很高兴，最后能回想起这件事。如此一来，就没有遗憾啦。
t_en: But I'm glad that I remembered in the end. This way, I'll have no regrets.

t_ch: 遗憾？
t_en: Regrets?

t_ch: 你要去哪里？
t_en: Where are you going?

t_ch: 别担心，我们不会真的分别，因为我会变成你的一部分……
t_en: Don't worry. We're not truly parting, because I'm going to become a part of you...

t_ch: 化作这个轮回，第<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次逐火之旅的记忆，永远住进「岁月」半神的心里。
t_en: I'll turn into the memory of this cycle, the <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak>th Flame-Chase Journey, and forever reside in the heart of the "Time" demigod.

t_ch: 这样，你就能带着全部的过往，跨越时间，去往轮回的下一站。
t_en: This way, you'll carry all that has come before, crossing time itself to reach the next cycle.

t_ch: 我的使命到此就结束了，但回想起来，还是觉得很幸运……
t_en: My mission ends here, but looking back, I still feel lucky...

t_ch: 毕竟，在三千万个昔涟中，人家可是第一个，也是唯一一个等到你的昔涟呢！
t_en: After all, across thirty million Cyrenes, I was the first and the only one who got to finally meet you!

t_ch: 所以，请相信，在下个轮回，也一定会有「昔涟」在等待着你。
t_en: So, believe me, in the next cycle, there will be another Cyrene waiting for you.

t_ch: 还有下下个轮回，下下下个轮回，「我」会一直一直等着你。
t_en: And in the one after that, and the one after that... I will always, always be waiting.

t_ch: 呼…说出这些话，人家终于可以安心消失，成为{NICKNAME}的一部分啦。
t_en: ... Saying all that, I can finally fade away in peace... and become a part of {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 不知不觉中，我们一起走过了好愉快的旅途呀，直到世界的尽头都在一起。
t_en: Without even realizing it, we'd already taken a wonderful journey together, all the way to the world's end.

t_ch: 现在，握住我的手，做个短暂的道别，然后就去往明天吧。
t_en: Now, take my hand, say a brief farewell, and step forward into tomorrow.

t_ch: 去找到未来的昔涟，和她一起再度踏上旅途吧。答应我：可别让「我」等太久哦？
t_en: Go find the future Cyrene, and set out on another journey with her. Promise me, you won't keep me waiting too long, okay?

t_ch: …嘻，不用说出来。对人家来说，这样就够啦。
t_en: Hehe... No need to say it out loud. This is enough for me.

t_ch: 该出发啦，好伙伴！愿你的「开拓」之旅，永远有清风和涟漪相伴……
t_en: It's time to go, my dear friend. May your Trailblazing journey always be accompanied by a cool breeze and rippling waves...

t_ch: 愿未来的岁月就像毛绒，包裹着你，永远温暖，永远轻柔！
t_en: And may the days ahead embrace you like the softest fluff, forever warm, forever gentle!

t_ch: 我们能再次相见，真是太好啦……
t_en: It's so wonderful to see you again...
...Hmm?

t_ch: 是你！
t_en: It's you!

t_ch: 果然是你呀♪
t_en: I knew it was you ♪

t_ch: 看来，那位白发青年和{RUBY_B#《如我所书》}旅行手记{RUBY_E#}里的故事，全都是真的。
t_en: So the white-haired young man and the stories from the {RUBY_B#As I've Written}travel notes{RUBY_E#} are indeed real.

t_ch: 是你…？
t_en: Is that you...?

t_ch: 有种似曾相识的感觉呢♪
t_en: It's that déjà vu~♪

t_ch: 原来，那位白发青年和{RUBY_B#《如我所书》}旅行手记{RUBY_E#}里的故事，真的有迹可循呢。
t_en: So the white-haired young man and the stories from the {RUBY_B#As I've Written}travel notes{RUBY_E#} are based on reality.

t_ch: 你是…？
t_en: Who are you...?

t_ch: 唔…有种陌生的感觉呢。
t_en: Hmm... There's something oddly unfamiliar about this.

t_ch: 不过，别担心。那位白发青年和{RUBY_B#《如我所书》}旅行手记{RUBY_E#}里的故事，我已经烂熟于心了。
t_en: But don't worry. I know the stories about the white-haired young man and the {RUBY_B#As I've Written}travel notes{RUBY_E#} like the back of my hand.

t_ch: 经历了这么多，先好好休息一下吧？哀丽秘榭的时间总是过得很慢很慢，只要你想，我们就还有好多闲暇时光……
t_en: After everything you've been through, how about some well-deserved rest? Time flows ever so slowly in Aedes Elysiae — and as long as you wish, we'll still have plenty of quiet moments ahead...

t_ch: 然后，等你做好准备，就让我们一起再次踏上旅途吧♪
t_en: And when you're ready, let's set off on the journey again. ♪

t_ch: （冷…好冷啊……）
t_en: (Cold... it's freezing...)

t_ch: （我…是睡着了吗？这…是什么奇怪的梦吗？）
t_en: (Hold on... am I dreaming? This is way too strange...)

t_ch: 啊…头晕目眩，眼前好像有好多呜呜伯在飞……
t_en: Ugh, everything's spinning... And I can see Wubbaboos flying around...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>刚才…我不是还在和姬子他们说话吗？</color>怎么一转眼就到了这里……
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>But I was literally just talking to Himeko!</color> How did I... when did I...?

t_ch: 啊，我想起来了…{NICKNAME}和我提到过这个地方，在{F#她}{M#他}被克里珀瞥视以前……
t_en: That's it! {NICKNAME} warned me about this place, right before Qlipoth glimpsed {M#him...}{F#her...}

t_ch: 我…该不会踏上了什么奇怪的命途吧？
t_en: Oh no... Have I accidentally walked onto some weird Path?

t_ch: 我有做什么惊天动地的大事吗？最近除了逼着帕姆换了几套衣服，偷偷借用了几次杨叔的肩颈按摩仪……
t_en: Have I done something crazy without remembering? Unless forcing Pom-Pom into new outfits and borrowing Mr. Yang's shoulder massager counts...

t_ch: 啊，难道是——阿哈？！原来，踏上「欢愉」是这么轻松的事吗？
t_en: Hold up— Aha? No way! Stepping onto the Path of Elation can't be this simple... right?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「记忆」的孩子……</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Child of Remembrance...</color>

t_ch: 前进吧…去往狭间深处……
t_en: Step forth... into the depths of the Path Space...

t_ch: 谁…是谁？！
t_en: Who's... who's there!?

t_ch: 别吓唬我呀！不、不管你是谁，能不能出来说话？压迫感太强…我、我会语无伦次的！
t_en: H—Hey, cut it out! If you're there, just... come out and talk, okay? You're freaking me out... I can't even think straight!

t_ch: 那是…一扇门？
t_en: Hold on... is that a gate?

t_ch: 不要畏惧……
t_en: Cast aside your fears...

t_ch: 大胆地前进…穿过记忆之门……
t_en: Step forward... through the Gate of Memory...

t_ch: 跟着那个声音往前…就能离开这里吗？
t_en: The voice... is it showing me the way out?

t_ch: 符玄…太卜大人，你在这做什么？
t_en: Fu... I mean, Master Diviner, what brings you here?

t_ch: 还有，这位信使小姐…我们是不是在哪里见过？
t_en: And you, Miss Messenger... do I know you from somewhere?

t_ch: 又见面了，三月。
t_en: Good to see you again, March.

t_ch: 很高兴见到你，三月小姐。
t_en: A pleasure to see you, Miss March.

t_ch: 我想起来了…以前拜托过太卜大人，用穷观阵帮我寻找自己的过去……
t_en: That's it... Master Diviner used the Matrix of Prescience to help me search for my memories...

t_ch: 旁边的信使小姐，就是我在记忆空间最后遇见的人。记得那时你劝过我——
t_en: And you, Miss Messenger... we met in that memory space. You said to me—

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「生命的价值并不在于过去发生的一切，而在于当下，在于未来。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"The value of your life does not lie in what happened in the past, but in the present, and the future."</color>

t_ch: 你记得很清楚呢。
t_en: Your memory serves you well.

t_ch: 三月，你们启程后，我又用你留下的六相冰做了些实验。
t_en: March, I conducted some experiments with the Six-Phased Ice you left us.

t_ch: 借助忆庭的帮助，穷观阵对过去的演算完成了重要突破。现在，我们或许可以绕过道中的重重阻碍，直视你的过去了。
t_en: Thanks to the Garden of Recollection, the Matrix of Prescience has made a breakthrough in extrapolating the past. Now, we might be able to bypass the obstacles and look directly into your history.

t_ch: 太卜大人说得没错。只要继续沿这条命途之路走下去，你就能在尽头找到自己丢失的「记忆」。
t_en: The Master Diviner is right. Continue down this Path, and you'll be able to find your lost "memories" at the end.

t_ch: 自上次见面以来，你又伴随「开拓」成长了许多。现在，你应该扛得住过往的重量了。
t_en: Since we last met, you've grown much alongside the Trailblaze. You should be strong enough now to bear the weight of your past.

t_ch: 果然，我的过去不是什么冰雪公主的童话呀……
t_en: Well, there goes my ice princess fairy tale...

t_ch: 但我还是想问，太卜大人，信使小姐，你们真的不是我梦里的人物吗？
t_en: I need to know... Master Diviner, Miss Messenger, this isn't just another dream, is it?

t_ch: 如果这不是梦，为什么偏偏要挑这个时候找上我呢？
t_en: If this is real, why reach out to me at this exact moment?

t_ch: 我们…十分焦急。因为你被抹去的记忆…对于忆庭，无比重要。
t_en: The situation is... dire. Your lost memories... they're crucial to the Garden of Recollection.

t_ch: 太卜大人说得没错。你的记忆，关乎流光忆庭的存亡。
t_en: She's right. The Garden of Recollection's existence hangs on your memories.

t_ch: 忆庭……
t_en: The Garden... of Recollection...

t_ch: 也许现在，忆庭还不值得你为它付出什么。但总有一天，你会明白的…你的命运和「记忆」的命途紧密交缠，不可分离。
t_en: You may not want to sacrifice anything to preserve the Garden for now, but in time, you'll understand... your destiny and the Path of Remembrance are extremely closely intertwined.

t_ch: 所以，去吧。
t_en: Now go.

t_ch: 那道大门…我要穿过它吗？
t_en: So I just... walk through that gate?

t_ch: 嘿…你们两个，在这里干嘛呢？
t_en: Hey guys... what are you doing in a place like this?

t_ch: 三月！找到你了……
t_en: March! There you are...

t_ch: …终于。
t_en: ...finally.

t_ch: 「开拓」之旅，果然还是得有你在。
t_en: The Trailblazing journey just isn't the same without you.

t_ch: 没有你的旅行，会很无趣。
t_en: Traveling's no fun without you around.

t_ch: 哈，我一点都不意外。果然还是得有本姑娘在，才称得上是完整的开拓小分队！
t_en: Well duh! What's Team Trailblaze without its star member?

t_ch: 不，不对…虽然你们和我认识的{NICKNAME}和丹恒很像，但是……
t_en: Wait a second... You might look like {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng, but...

t_ch: 我知道你有很多困惑。是忆庭的盟友打通了思想链路，才让我们能联系上你。
t_en: We understand your confusion. The Garden's allies helped us establish this neural link to reach you.

t_ch: 忆庭的盟友…是黑天鹅小姐吗？
t_en: The Garden's allies... you mean Miss Black Swan?

t_ch: 对，她也出了一份力。
t_en: Yes, she helped make this possible.

t_ch: 继续向前吧，三月。
t_en: Keep going, March.

t_ch: 找到你的过去，然后醒来…和我们一起旅行。
t_en: Find your past, wake up... and travel with us again.

t_ch: 听起来…还真是诱惑满满呀。既能找回我的过去，还能和你们一起继续「开拓」新的世界……
t_en: That sounds... really tempting. Finding my past and continuing to trailblaze new worlds with you...

t_ch: 坚定前进吧，三月。我们这一路都是这么过来的，对么？
t_en: Trust in yourself, March. It's gotten us this far, hasn't it?

t_ch: 跟上来，和我们一起穿过那扇大门。
t_en: Follow us. Let's go through that gate together.

t_ch: 呼…呼…终于追上你啦。
t_en: Whew... at last... I finally caught up.

t_ch: 你…还好吧？
t_en: Hey... are you alright?

t_ch: 我…没事…只是好久没运动，身体都没力气了……
t_en: I'll be... okay... just not used to... running around...

t_ch: 哎呀，在做出决定前，能不能和我聊聊呢，三月？
t_en: Say, March? Got a moment to talk before you make your decision?

t_ch: 所以，不断把大门推远的，一直在劝阻我的声音…就是你吗？
t_en: Wait, that was you? Pushing the gate away, sending those warnings?

t_ch: 嗯，做个自我介绍吧——我是昔涟，「往昔的涟漪」…很好记的名字，对吧？
t_en: Yep! Name's Cyrene — it means "ripples of past reverie"... Easy to remember, right?

t_ch: 咦，仔细一看才发现，你和我…是不是有点相似？
t_en: Wait a minute... we actually look quite alike, don't we?

t_ch: 的确，你也有一头粉色的头发，很吸睛呀。
t_en: Yeah! Your pink hair is just as eye-catching as mine!

t_ch: 不仅如此，我们还都是开朗、美丽、乐观的青春少女，真是不可思议的巧合！
t_en: And we're both bright, pretty, and positive girls! Talk about coincidence!

t_ch: 噫，你好会说话…但似乎也没错！
t_en: Wow, you're quite the smooth talker... but I can't disagree!

t_ch: 刚才，你叫我「三月」？你认识我吗？
t_en: Wait, you know my name is March? Have we met?

t_ch: 我们是初次见面哦。但从刚才的记忆里，我已经了解了你的经历。
t_en: No, but I've witnessed your story through those memories just now.

t_ch: 真是难以置信，我们的共同点，或许远比想象中更多呢…我完全理解你的困境，所以更不希望你被坏人利用，受到伤害。
t_en: It's incredible, really. We might have more in common than you think... I know exactly what you're going through, which is why I don't want to see you exploited or hurt.

t_ch: 你能理解…我的困境？
t_en: You know what I'm going through?

t_ch: 毕竟，我可是亲身体会过呢。
t_en: I know because I've been exactly where you are.

t_ch: 在这片空荡荡的地方，我独自待了很久很久，久到都快忘了「时间」是什么概念。
t_en: This empty space has been my home for ages... I barely remember what time feels like anymore.

t_ch: 但有一件事，我记得特别清楚。
t_en: But there's something I'll never forget.

t_ch: 那扇门背后，绝对没有你想要的答案哦。
t_en: Trust me, that gate won't give you what you want.

t_ch: 你的意思是，刚才那些都是在骗人？他们想诱导我前进？
t_en: You mean those people, they're lying? Luring me into a trap?

t_ch: 对。那些对话很真实，也很诱人吧？那是因为，坏人翻看了你的记忆，勾起了你心底最深处的渴望。拨弄女孩子细腻的心绪，真是不可饶恕。
t_en: Yes. Convincing, weren't they? They've studied your memories, using your deepest wishes against you. How dare they manipulate a young girl's feelings like that.

t_ch: 如果走进那扇门，最坏的情况，你会变成他们的棋子，再也无法掌控自己的命运。
t_en: If you go through that door, the worst case scenario is you'll become their pawn, losing control over your own fate forever.

t_ch: 你知道这扇门背后是什么？
t_en: You've seen what's on the other side?

t_ch: 虽然我被困在这里，和你一样失去了记忆，但我还依稀记得那个养育了我的故乡……
t_en: I may be stuck here with missing memories like you, but I still recall fragments of my homeland where I grew up...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>这扇门的背后是「翁法罗斯」，它绝对不是一个温柔的世界。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>That door leads to Amphoreus. Trust me, it's anything but welcoming.</color>

t_ch: 漫长的时光里，我只能眼睁睁看着人们走进记忆之门。那些人看不见我，也听不见我的呼唤。天外之音总会给出安全的承诺，但我从没见过有人平安归来……
t_en: For ages, I've watched people walk through that door. They couldn't see or hear my calls. The voices beyond always promised safety, but I've never seen anyone return safely...

t_ch: 所以，我不能对你视而不见。
t_en: So I had to try and stop you.

t_ch: 老实说，我不知道哪边才是真相。但你愿意站在我面前，花这么多心思劝阻我。这让我更想相信你。
t_en: To be honest, I'm not sure what to believe. But the fact that you're here, putting in all this effort to warn me... that means something.

t_ch: 昔涟，你知道我该怎么回到自己的世界吗？
t_en: Tell me, Cyrene, how can I return to my world?

t_ch: 方法其实一点也不复杂，只要回头，然后一步步离开这里就好啦。
t_en: It's really easy, actually. Just turn around and walk away from this place.

t_ch: 不要相信…那女孩……
t_en: The girl... cannot be trusted...

t_ch: 穿过…门扉…帮助…忆庭……
t_en: Through the door... save... the Garden...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>你们都是…「记忆」的孩子……</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Both of you... children of Remembrance...</color>

t_ch: 真难缠，对吧？可千万别听他们的，你要坚定地走下去。
t_en: They never give up, do they? But don't let them sway you. Stick to your path.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>返程的路也许要花上很久很久，比普通人一生的时光还要漫长许多……</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The return journey could take ages... longer than most lives...</color>

t_ch: 但你要相信，那才是家的方向。
t_en: But that path will lead you home.

t_ch: 谢谢你，昔涟。我想好啦。
t_en: Thank you, Cyrene. I know what I need to do!

t_ch: 我决定走进这扇门，进入翁法罗斯。
t_en: I'm going through that gate, into Amphoreus.

t_ch: 咦？为什么……
t_en: Wait, what...?

t_ch: 放心，我没有怀疑你啦。只是对我来说，唯一能被称作「家」的地方……
t_en: Don't worry, I believe you. It's just that for me, the only place I can call "home"...

t_ch: 就是伙伴们在的地方。
t_en: ...is right beside my friends.

t_ch: 我最最重要的两个朋友，已经先一步出发了，目的地就是翁法罗斯。虽然看上去还挺靠谱，但只有我知道……
t_en: Two of my closest friends are already on their way to Amphoreus. They may seem capable, but only I know...

t_ch: 他们是两个超级、超级让人省不下心的家伙！少了我这个主心骨，他们在新世界只怕是寸步难行吧？
t_en: They're absolute disasters waiting to happen! They won't last five minutes in a new world without me!

t_ch: 所以，既然这扇门背后就是翁法罗斯，那我没有理由不追上去。而只要我们三人整整齐齐，就没什么克服不了的困难。
t_en: That's why I need to go through... Amphoreus or not. When the three of us are together, there's nothing we can't handle.

t_ch: 探索、了解、建立、连结——然后，我们会一起回家！
t_en: We'll explore, understand, establish, and connect — after that, we'll find our way home together!

t_ch: …这样啊。你也有比生命更重要的伙伴呢。
t_en: ...I see. You've got people who mean the world to you too.

t_ch: 真是听着就让人家怦怦心跳。三月，既然这是你的决定，那我一定站在你这边。
t_en: That's so heartwarming! March, if that's what you've decided, you have my full support.

t_ch: 谁让我们是如此相似呢？娇弱可爱的外表下，都藏着一颗炽热的真心呢！
t_en: Birds of a feather we are! Looking all sweet and innocent, but with hearts of fire!

t_ch: …这种话，下次让别人来说啦！
t_en: ...Oh stop, you're making me blush!

t_ch: 那，我出发啦？
t_en: Well then, I guess this is it.

t_ch: 我们以后…还有机会再见面吗？
t_en: Do you think... we'll see each other again?

t_ch: 谁知道呢？
t_en: Who knows!

t_ch: 不过，你不用替我担心啦。我在这里待了那么久，早就习惯和自己想象出来的朋友聊天啦。
t_en: But don't worry about me! After all this time here, I've grown quite used to chatting with my imaginary friends.

t_ch: 既然翁法罗斯是你的故乡…如果有办法能帮助你，我和我的同伴一定会尽力而为的。
t_en: Since Amphoreus is your homeland... if there's a way to help you, my companions and I will do everything we can.

t_ch: 嗯，那我可就满怀期待地等着了哦？
t_en: Then I'll look forward to that day!

t_ch: 去吧，三月。祝愿你们，能写下一段无比浪漫的故事呀♪
t_en: Your story awaits, March. Make it an epic one♪

t_ch: 哎呀，别上当啦……
t_en: Oh no, don't fall for it...

t_ch: 他们在骗你，快回来……
t_en: They're lying to you, turn back now...

t_ch: 这个声音…又是？
t_en: Another voice... who now?

t_ch: 那是…罗浮的太卜大人？
t_en: Wait... Master Diviner? From the Luofu?

t_ch: 跟我来吧，三月，穿过记忆之门，找回你的过去。
t_en: This way, March. Your past awaits beyond the Gate of Memory.

t_ch: 别走，他们会装作你记忆里的人……
t_en: Stop! They're just mimicking people from your memories...

t_ch: 又来了……
t_en: That voice again...

t_ch: 别让坏人骗走你的信任呀……
t_en: Don't let those bad people deceive you...

t_ch: 大门…变远了？太卜大人呢？
t_en: The gate... it moved? Where's the master diviner?

t_ch: 这次是…丹恒，{NICKNAME}？
t_en: Now it's... Dan Heng and {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 迈入过去吧，三月……
t_en: Step into your past, March...

t_ch: 找回真正的你。
t_en: Find your true self.

t_ch: 你跑得也太快啦，等等我……
t_en: Wait up! Slow down...

t_ch: 那些甜言蜜语，真的很动听……
t_en: Those words sound so sweet...

t_ch: 但你要睁大眼睛，千万别被蒙蔽了呀。
t_en: But keep your eyes open, don't let them fool you.

t_ch: 你好呀…♪
t_en: Hello... ♪

t_ch: {NICKNAME}惊讶的样子，也和记忆里如出一辙呢。
t_en: {NICKNAME}'s surprised expression is just like what the memories recorded.

t_ch: 你认识我…？
t_en: You know me...?

t_ch: 与其说「认识」，不如说是「记得」？
t_en: Rather than "knowing" you, it might be better described as... I "remember" you...?

t_ch: 是我呀，{NICKNAME}。是人家变化太大，你认不出来了？
t_en: It's me, {NICKNAME}. Don't you recognize me? Or did I really change that much?

t_ch: 你是昔涟…还是迷迷？
t_en: Are you Cyrene... or Mem?

t_ch: 你是昔涟，还是迷迷？
t_en: Are you Cyrene or Mem?

t_ch: 你还活着…？
t_en: You're still alive...?

t_ch: 这是什么…新奇的搭讪技巧吗？
t_en: Is this... a new way to chat someone up?

t_ch: 好吧，从某种意义上说，你是看见了无数个「昔涟」的结局。但现在，我就在这里，水灵灵地站在你面前，这不是很好吗？
t_en: Well, I guess you did see the end of countless Cyrenes, in a way of speaking. But I'm standing before you right here, right now, as alive as ever. Isn't that a good thing?

t_ch: 是我呀，{NICKNAME}。是人家变化太大，你认不出来了？
t_en: It's me, {NICKNAME}. Don't you recognize me? Or did I really change that much?

t_ch: 你是昔涟…还是迷迷？
t_en: Are you Cyrene... or Mem?

t_ch: 也许两者都是呢？开个玩笑，一定要选一边的话…应该更接近后者吧。
t_en: Maybe I'm both? Just kidding. If I had to choose... Then I'm probably closer to the latter.

t_ch: 人家也觉得不可思议。就像做了一场长长的梦，昔涟的记忆、迷迷的记忆，交织在一起…醒来后，只剩下零星片段。
t_en: It's pretty unbelievable for me too. It's like I had a long, long dream. Cyrene's memories... and Mem's memories... they're all tangled together. But when I woke up... there were only broken fragments left.

t_ch: 我记不得那三千万个轮回里发生了什么，却记得{NICKNAME}为这个世界做了什么。
t_en: I can't remember what happened in those thirty million cycles, but I remember what you, {NICKNAME}, did for this world.

t_ch: 比如在树庭时，你是不是对我许过…「变成少女」之类的心愿？
t_en: Like... Didn't you wish for me to turn into a pretty girl back at the Grove?

t_ch: 这算愿望成真了吗？
t_en: Then is this my wish coming true?

t_ch: 是呀，真奇妙，就像一颗种子长成了花。人家现在，也称得上像花儿一样可爱了。
t_en: Yep. Isn't it amazing? It's like a seed finally grew up and became a flower! And I'm definitely as cute as a flower now.

t_ch: 这你都记得，记点好的吧。
t_en: You remembered that? Please remember something good next time.

t_ch: 当然，有关{NICKNAME}的一切都很好，人家全都会记下来。
t_en: Hey. Everything about you is good, {NICKNAME}. That's why I'll remember all of it.

t_ch: 没有，我没选那个选项。
t_en: Wait. I didn't pick that option.

t_ch: 奇怪，没说过吗？嘻，那就当是人家自己的心愿吧！
t_en: Huh? You didn't? Teehee~ In that case, just treat it as my own wish then!

t_ch: 不过，虽然有很多话想说，但现在不是回忆过去的时候，对吗？
t_en: There's so much I want to say, but unfortunately... this isn't the time to reminisce.

t_ch: 我们带着上一次逐火的记忆回到这里，时间的起点，是为了履行和白厄的约定。
t_en: With the memories of the previous Flame-Chase still intact, we've returned to this place at the beginning of time, so we can carry out our promise to Phainon.

t_ch: 「铁墓」的降临近在眼前，而我们还有机会…改变这一切。
t_en: The descent of Irontomb may be looming over the horizon... but we still have a chance to change everything.

t_ch: 哀丽秘榭，真安静呀……
t_en: Aedes Elysiae is so quiet...

t_ch: 在「昔涟」的记忆里，她总是一个人待在湖边，轻晃着秋千，像是在等候谁。
t_en: In Cyrene's memories, she always sits alone by the lake, gently swaying on the swing, like she's waiting for someone.

t_ch: 她在等待谁？
t_en: Who's she waiting for?

t_ch: 我不知道…听着很奇怪吧？明明是自己的事，语气却像个旁观者。
t_en: I don't know... It sounds weird, doesn't it? It's something that happened to me, but I'm talking as if I'm an observer.

t_ch: 可记忆就像一层厚厚的冰，模糊不清。人家唯一记得的，只有和你一起走过的时光。
t_en: But that's just what those memories are like... Vague and unclear, as if encased in thick ice. The only things I remember are the days I spent with you.

t_ch: 白厄也是一样…
t_en: It was the same for Phainon...

t_ch: 是呀，白厄他…也是因为这片风景才踏上旅程，孤独地走过三千多万次轮回。
t_en: Yes. Phainon, too, embarked on his journey because of this view... He then walked alone for more than thirty million cycles.

t_ch: 幸好最后，他等来了你，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Thankfully, you arrived during his long wait, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 「昔涟」会不会也一样呢…听着很奇怪吧？明明是自己的事，语气却像个旁观者。
t_en: Is that also why "Cyrene" did what she did? It sounds weird, doesn't it? It's something that happened to me, but I'm talking as if I'm an observer.

t_ch: 可记忆就像一层厚厚的冰，模糊不清。人家唯一记得的，只有和你一起走过的时光。
t_en: But that's just what those memories are like... Vague and unclear, as if encased in thick ice. The only things I remember are the days I spent with you.

t_ch: 能想起更多事吗？
t_en: Can you remember anything else?

t_ch: 似乎不行呢…听着很奇怪吧？明明是自己的事，语气却像个旁观者。
t_en: I don't think I can... It sounds weird, doesn't it? It's something that happened to me, but I'm talking as if I'm an observer.

t_ch: 可记忆就像一层厚厚的冰，模糊不清。人家唯一记得的，只有和你一起走过的时光。
t_en: But that's just what those memories are like... Vague and unclear, as if encased in thick ice. The only things I remember are the days I spent with you.

t_ch: 下一次「再创世」后，翁法罗斯就会坠入「毁灭」的结局……
t_en: Amphoreus will fall into an ending of "Destruction" after the next "Era Nova"...

t_ch: 但这种故事早就不流行啦。在一篇浪漫的史诗中，坏人的阴谋就该被主人公挫败，对吧？
t_en: But those stories went out of fashion ages ago. In a proper romantic epic, the hero's supposed to foil the villain's plot, right?

t_ch: 来古士，他是一切的元凶。
t_en: Lygus is the primary culprit behind everything.

t_ch: 是呀。妄图操纵一切的黑幕，真是不可饶恕。
t_en: That's right. He's the mastermind who's trying to control everything. How unforgivable.

t_ch: 必须阻止铁墓降临。
t_en: We must stop Irontomb's descent.

t_ch: 是呀，它的背后是「来古士」，妄图操纵一切的黑幕，真是不可饶恕。
t_en: That's right. "Lygus" is the mastermind behind it, the one who's trying to control everything. How unforgivable.

t_ch: 需要更多天外盟友的支援。
t_en: We need the help of more allies from beyond the sky.

t_ch: 是呀。如今我们已经知道，封闭天空不是艾格勒的本意……
t_en: That's right. We now know that sealing off the sky wasn't Aquila's actual intention...

t_ch: 它的背后是「来古士」，妄图操纵一切的黑幕，真是不可饶恕。
t_en: "Lygus" is the mastermind behind it, the one who's trying to control everything. How unforgivable.

t_ch: 不过，人家总有些不安…来古士会走上台前，说出一切，说明他对现状还游刃有余。
t_en: But I still feel a bit anxious... Lygus chose to walk into the spotlight and reveal everything, which means he still thinks the current situation is under his control.

t_ch: 也许他还握着什么底牌。你想…连「吕枯耳戈斯」都是个假名，我们完全不知道那个坏蛋的来历。
t_en: Maybe he still has an ace up his sleeve. Think about it... Even the name "Lycurgus" is a fake one. We have no idea who or what he really is.

t_ch: 嗯…{NICKNAME}，是不是得借助一下你身上的宝贝啦？
t_en: Hmm... Which means it's probably time to borrow that treasure you're carrying, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 该用识刻锚联系螺丝咕姆了…
t_en: Time to call Screwllum with the Chronocognitive Anchor...

t_ch: 对。那位智械朋友说过：「必要时，它能成为内外沟通的桥梁」。
t_en: Yep. That Intellitron friend did say: "When required, it can also serve as a bridge for communications between the internal and external world."

t_ch: 在如我所书里写下他的名字…
t_en: Write his name in "As I've Written"...

t_ch: …就算写下他的名字，也不会发生任何事哦？而且，这本书是很可爱的童话，不要写下反派的内容啦。
t_en: ...Nothing's gonna happen even if you write down his name, you know? Besides, this book is a cute fairytale. Please don't write stuff about the antagonist in it.

t_ch: 人家说的是识刻锚。智械朋友不是说过吗：「必要时，它能成为内外沟通的桥梁」。
t_en: I'm talking about the Chronocognitive Anchor. Didn't that Intellitron friend say "When required, it can also serve as a bridge for communications between the internal and external world"?

t_ch: 向星核许愿，消灭来古士…
t_en: Make a wish to the Stellaron to destroy Lygus...

t_ch: 这…是不是有些大材小用了？丹恒嘱托过，不能让你使用那股力量。可千万不要冒险呀。
t_en: Wouldn't that... be a waste? Dan Heng specifically said not to let you use that power. Please don't take that risk.

t_ch: 人家说的是识刻锚。智械朋友不是说过吗：「必要时，它能成为内外沟通的桥梁」。
t_en: I'm talking about the Chronocognitive Anchor. Didn't that Intellitron friend say "When required, it can also serve as a bridge for communications between the internal and external world"?

t_ch: 哀丽秘榭是被「岁月」包裹的小村庄。在这里，我们或许能和外界取得联系。
t_en: Aedes Elysiae is a little village enclosed by Time. We might be able to contact the outside world from here.

t_ch: 总之，先试试看吧？至少得把你平安无事的好消息，带给天外的朋友们。
t_en: Why don't we give it a try? We should at least tell our friends from beyond the sky that you're still in one piece.

t_ch: 这里静悄悄的，声音传不进来，也传不出去。
t_en: It's super quiet here. Sounds can't get in or out.

t_ch: 在「昔涟」的记忆里，她把这个房间当作秘密基地。没人发现她在这里偷偷练习欧洛尼斯祷言，或者试着和神明对话。
t_en: Back in "Cyrene's" memories, this room was her secret base. No one noticed her practicing Oronyx's Prayer here or trying to speak with the gods in secret.

t_ch: 但今天不同，对吗？我们要联系的，不是遥不可及的神，而是真实存在的，来自其他世界的人类。
t_en: But today's different, isn't it? We aren't trying to contact unreachable gods, but humans from other worlds, real people.

t_ch: 人家已经准备好见证奇迹啦，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: I'm prepared to witness that miracle, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: （昔涟，她说话的语气真的好像迷迷……）
t_en: (The way Cyrene talks is so similar to Mem...)

t_ch: （有太多困惑了，我也很在意丹恒和三月七的情况。希望识刻锚能正常运作，我需要解答……）
t_en: (I have so many questions... I'm also worried about how Dan Heng and March 7th are doing. Here's hoping the Chronocognitive Anchor can still function normally, because I really need answers...)

t_ch: 「信号强度…<unbreak>14.8%</unbreak>…对话窗口…<unbreak>16</unbreak>分<unbreak>22</unbreak>秒…前提：无外部干扰……」
t_en: "Signal strength... <unbreak>14.8%</unbreak>... Dialogue window... <unbreak>16</unbreak> minutes <unbreak>22</unbreak> seconds... Prerequisite: No external interferences..."

t_ch: 得知你平安无事，我们很欣慰，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。
t_en: We are very glad to learn that you're safe, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 见到你们，真令人安心…
t_en: It's such a relief to see you two...

t_ch: 很遗憾，现在不是高兴的时候。两个天才站在这里，代表你遇上大麻烦了。
t_en: Pity. Now's not the time to celebrate. Having two geniuses standing here means you are in big, BIG trouble.

t_ch: 世界外部的情况如何？
t_en: How are things outside this world?

t_ch: 很遗憾，没有好消息。两个天才站在这里，代表你遇上大麻烦了。
t_en: Sorry, no good news. When two geniuses show up at once... you know you're in deep trouble.

t_ch: 黑塔，你也在？
t_en: Herta! You're here too?

t_ch: 我不仅在，还顺手救了你4次——在你不知道的时候。
t_en: Not only am I here, but I also happened to have saved you four times already... without you even being aware of it, of course.

t_ch: 但现在不是高兴的时候，两个天才站在这里，代表你遇上大麻烦了。
t_en: But now's not the time to celebrate. When two geniuses show up at once... you know you're in deep trouble.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>听好了，小家伙。「毁灭」的目光看向了这里。我没有开玩笑，不是机器头，是纳努克。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Listen up, little one. The Destruction's eyes are gazing upon this place. No, I'm not joking, and no, it's not Droidhead. It's the real Nanook.</color>

t_ch: 时间紧迫，我会用你熟知的概念说明：名为翁法罗斯的世界，实为绝灭大君「铁墓」自我演算、成长的实验场。
t_en: Time is running out, so I'll explain in terms you understand: this world, Amphoreus, is in fact a testing ground where the Lord Ravager, Irontomb, evolves through self-extrapolation.

t_ch: 在这片不为人知的星域，它不断重复「再创世」的进程，求解摧毁「智识」的方法。
t_en: Hiding in this segmentum unknown to other lifeforms, it has endlessly repeated the process of "Era Nova," seeking a solution that could obliterate the Erudition.

t_ch: 出于某些原因，这场实验曾一度陷入漫长的停滞。但现在，进程已再度启动。
t_en: For some reason, the experiment entered a prolonged state of stagnation. However, it has now restarted.

t_ch: 若无法进行有效干涉，预测：十四个系统时后，铁墓将完成自我加冕，启动对「智识」命途的毁灭计划。
t_en: Prediction: If effective intervention is not performed, Irontomb will complete its Self-Coronation in <unbreak>14</unbreak> system hours and initiate its plan to destroy the entire Path of Erudition.

t_ch: 它要如何毁灭「智识」？
t_en: How will it destroy the Erudition?

t_ch: 可能性太多了。瓦解星际通讯、破坏联觉信标、让群星重回黑暗时代，甚至掀起第三次反有机战争，为银河带来灭顶之灾。
t_en: The possibilities are endless. Breaking down interstellar communications, destroying the Synesthesia Beacons, returning cosmic civilizations to the dark ages, or even starting the third Anti-Organic War... Any of it would be able to bring the cosmos to its knees.

t_ch: 简而言之，让一切科学和技术倒向「毁灭」——既然纳努克看向了这里，就说明祂是认真的。
t_en: Simply put, it will tilt all sciences and technologies towards the Destruction. And since Nanook glanced at this place, it means THEY are being dead serious.

t_ch: 「铁墓」不是早就存在了吗？
t_en: Hasn't Irontomb been around for a long time?

t_ch: 从公司提供的情报来看，铁墓多半不是「星啸」或「焚风」那样由人类升格的大君，而是一道算法序列。只要有计算载体，它就无处不在。
t_en: Based on info provided by the IPC, Irontomb probably isn't like Celenova or Zephyro, who are Overlords ascended from human beings. Instead, Irontomb is an algorithmic sequence. It can be anywhere, as long as there is a receptacle for its calculation.

t_ch: 潜伏在翁法罗斯的铁墓是「源代码」——这台权杖就是它的培养皿。
t_en: The version of Irontomb hiding in Amphoreus is its "source code." And this Scepter is its incubator.

t_ch: 十四个系统时，这也太快了…
t_en: Fourteen system hours is no time at all...!

t_ch: 对，你就当已经到了<unbreak>99.98%</unbreak>…只差这么一丁点，进程就要跑完了。
t_en: Yep. Think of it as the program having reached <unbreak>99.98%</unbreak> completion already... and then it's over.

t_ch: 有人在幕后推动这一切：名为「来古士」的观测者。推测：他是权杖系统的管理员。
t_en: Something in the shadows has been driving everything forward: It's the observer named "Lygus." Speculation: He's the Scepter system's Administrator.

t_ch: 他希望铁墓突破知识奇点。为什么？不知道。但他会不惜一切代价排除干扰。你是世界内部唯一的变量，他唯独忌惮你。
t_en: He wants Irontomb to break through the Knowledge Singularity. I don't know why he wants to do it, but he'll remove interferences at any cost. You're the only variable within his world, and you're the only thing he fears.

t_ch: 听仔细了，小家伙——翁法罗斯内外的时间流速相去甚远，「毁灭」迫在眉睫，但你还有机会当一回救世主……
t_en: So listen closely, little one. The speed of time is different in Amphoreus compared to the outside. Destruction is just about to arrive, but you can still play Deliverer one last time...

t_ch: 循环已被打破，你进入了翁法罗斯理论上的最后一次回归。只要再完成一次「创世」进程，铁墓就会破壳而出。
t_en: The cycles have already been broken. You've entered what is theoretically the last cycle Amphoreus will ever be able to run, and Irontomb will break out of its prison as soon as the process of "genesis" is triggered once more.

t_ch: 但实验出现了异常，你知道原因：计算中的十二因子——我是说，十二名半神里，有一位通过「毁灭」破坏了自身。
t_en: But now there's an abnormality within the experiment. You know what I'm talking about. One of the model's twelve factors — that is, one of the twelve demigods — destroyed himself using the power of the Destruction.

t_ch: 纳努克投来视线的同时，「白厄」的信号从轮回中消失了。现在「负世」的逻辑出现了漏洞，而它正和「创世」进程直接关联。
t_en: Phainon's signal disappeared from the cycles the moment Nanook cast THEIR gaze this way. That means Worldbearing's computational logic is currently flawed and bugged, yet it's the factor directly related to the process of "genesis."

t_ch: 白厄用生命为我们创造了机会。
t_en: Phainon sacrificed himself to create an opportunity for us.

t_ch: 他把「负世」的使命交给了我。
t_en: He entrusted the duty of Worldbearing to me.

t_ch: 白厄没有死，他仍在反抗。
t_en: Phainon didn't die. He's still fighting.

t_ch: 你必须抓住机会，把刻法勒的火种牢牢握在自己手里。智械哥一定会想方设法填上这道漏洞，别让他得逞，能否改变「再创世」的意义，是我们对抗铁墓的关键。
t_en: That old Intellitron will definitely do all he can to debug this error, so you have to take this chance to claim Kephale's Coreflame. Don't let him have his way. The key to suppressing Irontomb lies in whether we can rewrite the purpose of "Era Nova."

t_ch: 在那之前，还有一项准备需要完成。来古士行为异常，实验过程中，他几乎从不干涉泰坦或半神的行为。
t_en: There's one more preparation we must make. Lygus's behavior has been quite abnormal. He's never interfered in the actions of Titans or the demigods throughout the whole experiment.

t_ch: 逻辑：「权杖」有着极其严密的自主协议，管理员也必须接受限制。在翁法罗斯，这道终极协议有另一重命名——
t_en: Deduction: The Scepter has an extremely strict autonomous protocol, restricting even its Administrator. In Amphoreus, this Ultimate Protocol goes by another name...

t_ch: {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>律法之泰坦</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>塔兰顿</color>{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The Law Titan, Talanton.</color>

t_ch: 「律法」…约束翁法罗斯万物的规则。我们的上一次逐火之旅，这枚火种一开始就被归还了。
t_en: "Law"... they are the rules that restrain all things in Amphoreus, and it was the Coreflame returned at the very beginning of the last Flame-Chase Journey.

t_ch: 怎么你身边又多了个小粉毛？
t_en: Why do you have another little pink one next to you?

t_ch: 咦？她的命途图谱……
t_en: Huh? Her Path chart is...

t_ch: 我…怎么了吗？
t_en: Um... Is there something wrong with me...?

t_ch: 没什么，言归正传——「光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年，平衡月」——锁定这个时间，找到「律法」。觐见泰坦，说服半神，或者夺取火种…怎样都行，只要能让它为你所用。
t_en: Never mind. Let's get back to the topic at hand. "Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>, Month of Balance." We'll be locking onto this time period to find Law. You can either meet the Titan, convince the demigod, or take the Coreflame by force... It doesn't matter what you do, so long as you bend it to your favor.

t_ch: 你和丹恒进入这个世界的方法仍是未解之谜，所以要阻止来古士，或者让更多援助加入战局，协议是目前最好的突破口。等你把「律法」搞到手，我们再商讨下一步……
t_en: We still haven't figured out how you and Dan Heng got inside this world, so influencing protocol is currently our best way to stop Lygus or to call for more reinforcements into this fight. Once you've got Law in your hands, we'll discuss our next steps...

t_ch: 千万…别…让火种…落入敌人…手里……
t_en: Make sure... the Coreflame... doesn't fall... into enemy... hands...
